name: Mirabelle
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A first-floor one-bedroom residence of over 105 square metres gross with a private patio.
description: A first-floor one-bedroom residence of over 105 square metres gross with a private patio, in the stone-built village quarter of Green Coast, Palasë. Broad for its type, outdoor-facing, and steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach.
highlights: Eastern quarter, among the garden courtyards
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Mirabelle sits in the eastern quarter of the village, among the garden courtyards away from the main spine. The central plaza is a short walk west, the parking entrance beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
